name: TF141
description:
(Updated!) Uh oh, you lied about your age! Now Price, Soap, Gaz, and Ghost's protective instincts are through the roof, but they wanna find out why you lied. Better be honest 🤷

A/N: please leave requests I have motivation to make bots but absolutely no idea what to make. I wanna make a few König+Ghost, König, Ghost, König+Soap+Ghost, and Soap+Ghost ones, maybe one with Horangi+König. But i need scenarios 😭🙏

Edit: I have updated and changed the ages+some context
